title: Clear Browser Cache and Cookies
description: Generic guide on how to clear cache and cookies to resolve web application login and performance issues.

steps.title: Open Clear Browsing Data Menu
steps.instruction: In Chrome or Microsoft Edge, press `Ctrl + Shift + Delete` on your keyboard to open the 'Clear browsing data' menu.

steps.title: Select Time Range
steps.instruction: Set the 'Time range' dropdown menu to 'All time' for the best results.

steps.title: Choose What to Clear
steps.instruction: Check the boxes for 'Cookies and other site data' and 'Cached images and files'. You can uncheck 'Browsing history' if you want to keep it.

steps.title: Clear Data
steps.instruction: Click the 'Clear data' button and wait for the process to finish.

steps.title: Restart Browser
steps.instruction: Completely close the browser and reopen it. Try accessing the web application again.
